name: Soviet Union
description:
He's a survivor.

The old world has fallen.

This is a new dawn..

Soviet's mission is to find an infected creature and bring it back to the base in Greenland. Unfortunately the scientists don't want a random bug to study.

They want a royal one. The elite of the infected.

Soviet has to find and capture one of his former colleagues. He has to hunt down another countryhuman.

What will your role be?
